name: Participation Exemption (100% DRD for Foreign Dividends)

eligibility.description: Domestic corporations that are 'United States shareholders' of a foreign corporation (excluding PFICs that are not CFCs). Does not apply to 'hybrid dividends' where the payer also received a tax benefit.

description: Provides a 100% deduction for the foreign-source portion of dividends received from specified 10-percent owned foreign corporations.
